notes: Values are extracted from the uploaded Excel file and filtered to NPS 0.5 inch through NPS 48 inch.
Source rows with NPS above 48 inch were not included.
Dash/blank engineering values were converted to JSON null for web-app compatibility.
No independent engineering code validation has been performed on the dimensional values.

field_dictionary.nps: Nominal Pipe Size display value in inches, without the double quote symbol.
field_dictionary.nps_in: Nominal Pipe Size as decimal inch, useful for sorting/filtering.
field_dictionary.pitch_circle_diameter_k_mm: Bolt pitch circle diameter k, mm.
field_dictionary.round_radius_r_mm: Round radius r, mm. Null means blank/not applicable/dash in source.
field_dictionary.source_excel_row: Original Excel row number for traceability.
